barRaise.topFinding: The loop is closed. This project's bar-raise had never enqueued a finding in ten runs; this run wired it and filed 55 items, with a post-write gate confirming every open HIGH and MEDIUM now resolves to a queue item. That is the only thing that got better, and it is the thing that gates everything else. Health falls 67 to 64 because three lenses measured the machinery rather than the site and found it worse than believed, not because anything regressed: nothing shipped at all, 57 commits touched zero owned surfaces, and the three staged files have now rotted seven days. The BLOCK stands a tenth run and its surface widened again to nine references. Two findings genuinely change the picture. The gates are decorative rather than protective, and one gate's secret is published in cleartext in a tracked, publicly-served handler, so the mirrors are unadvertised rather than protected and Kane needs to say which he intended. And the repo is at 95% of a hard external ceiling, growing daily from machine churn against a small site, which is the first finding here with a real deadline attached. The sharpest operational fact is a sequencing trap: the broken pwsh command is the only reason the queue serializer bug has never fired, so the previously-recommended fix order would have corrupted the queue. A pattern now recurs across three runs and is worth naming on its own: five separate lenses found the previous run's fix prescriptions under-scoped, so the standing risk here is confidently-worded remediations that would not have closed their findings.

actions.title: Reroute all seven gate anchors plus the two legacy-stub references to the client-gated design pages, then re-grep to confirm zero anchors resolve to the gated paths (clears BLOCK)
Remove the gate's shared secret from the tracked, publicly-served repo-root handler so it is no longer published in cleartext
Widen the ignore patterns to cover the archive, .recon and timestamp-suffixed backups BEFORE running git rm --cached across all 72 tracked internal artifacts, then redeploy and confirm each 404s
Swap only queue-edit.ps1:91's serializer to a python writer, keeping its lock and tmp+rename+readback protocol; this MUST land before the pwsh fix
Point both hourly queue writers at the single-flight lock, or give the python writer the same .work-queue.lock acquire and stale-break protocol
Scope push-to-github.ps1's staging to an explicit pathspec so the sanctioned release path can ship a targeted edit
Ship the three operator-authored files uncommitted since 2026-07-10 through release.ps1 with an explicit pathspec
Move the status-JSON, index.html tail and CNAME assertions into deploy-pages.yml so every writer crosses a guard
Fix release.ps1 step ordering so a corrupt dashboard JSON cannot be written, warned about, and pushed
Add -Encoding utf8 to all twelve PowerShell JSON reads and repair the six corrupted strings now live in two published files
Commit the drain queue on every run and drop the stale .gitignore:38 entry so the tracked-plus-ignored trap cannot end the only backup
Fix all six dead Budget source links: make the repo public or drop the published-and-auditable claim
Fix the hero stat strip and tagline: nine cards, not six, and 4 live + 6 in build cannot sum to a stated total of 6
Rewrite the About enumeration to cover all nine projects; Cattery, Gnosis and Ring have no narrative anywhere on the site
Widen the skip-gate fix to scope BOTH the commit check and the tree-unchanged check to YaE-owned paths; the queued fix addresses only one of three blockers
Lift --fg-3 to #7b8797 and --fg-2 to #737e8d; both current tokens fail AA against the page AND card backgrounds
Copy the homepage's :focus-visible and prefers-reduced-motion patterns into the 18 sub-pages, status and 404
Record the run's measured token cost into the status JSON alongside actionsOpen/actionsClosed so the cadence decision has a cost-per-closed-action number
Derive both dashboard aggregation paths from one project list and decide the retired project's disposition explicitly
Add a mojibake reject regex to check-status-json.ps1 and extend its glob to dashboard/data/*.json
Wrap write-dashboard-status.ps1's write in the same 5-attempt readback loop its sibling queue-edit.ps1 already has
Prune the 98 terminal queue items into the archive via a python writer and make the drain prune on every pass
Add 'superseded' to the terminal exclusion at collect-usage.ps1:830 and assert row count equals the bucket sum
Promote one projects.json to source of truth with per-surface visibility flags; the predicted drift has now actually happened
Add schemaVersion plus a required-key assertion to check-status-json.ps1 and reconcile Skylight.json onto the project/displayName shape
Migrate .project-context.json to schema v1.1 in one edit and add hard_rule_checks; YaE is the last project in the portfolio on v1
Change the four pwsh invocations to powershell -File, but ONLY after the serializer fix lands
Add og:image, og:url and twitter:card to every public page via a head pass in the stamper
Add Cattery and Gnosis to the meta/og/twitter descriptions and the JSON-LD hasPart, deriving all four from the card registry
Ship the sitemap self-heal regenerator; today's card-to-sitemap parity is coincidental hand-maintenance, not enforcement
Correct the three design page titles that name the wrong project, and fix the copied sessionStorage key on the Ring design page
Promote the existing section-label elements to real h2 headings on 7 project pages and status, and give 404.html an h1
Port the Budget and Scheduler project pages onto the current template; they are the last two on a superseded generation
Make update-project-pages.mjs exit non-zero on missing or malformed status JSON instead of stamping stale values
Make the status staleness check fail closed on a missing or unparseable timestamp; Gnosis is a live victim today
Return 404 or 503 from the dashboard Worker for an absent KV key so the dashboard's static fallback engages
Exit non-zero from collect-usage.ps1 on KV-push and git-push failure, and add a stale-data banner to the dashboard
Validate project/priority/severity/status against enums in queue-edit.ps1's add path and warn loudly instead of silently defaulting an unmapped project
Dedupe the archive by id, resolve the item that is pending in BOTH stores, and make queue-edit.ps1's drop archive rather than delete
Run git gc and git prune on the local clone once, with no scheduled routines in flight
Add defensive ignore patterns for secret-shaped filenames and a pre-push staged-file check to push-to-github.ps1
Untrack the staged skill tree; robots is advisory and is the only thing currently in front of it
Cap the items array in the published queue payload and render a count plus a link for the remainder
Have the dashboard enrichment path consume the payload the main render already fetched instead of issuing its own no-store fetch and 5-minute poll
Set the Ring homepage card label to Live to match its own status class, its project page, and its working Launch link
Retire BAR_RAISE_ROADMAP.md as complete and rewrite or delete BAR_RAISE_HANDOVER.md, which documents a scheduling mechanism that no longer exists
Add a pack script that rebuilds every .skill and the plugin bundle from source on release, or delete the stale packaged artifacts
Scope the no-trackers and no-CDN-fonts claims to the homepage itself rather than to the whole portfolio
Add an -Op list with -Project/-Status/-Priority filters printing one line per item
Align the Budget page's --amber to the homepage's gold and delete the unreferenced amber/warn declarations from the other 17 sub-pages
Add role=status and aria-live=polite to the status page error banner, copying Ring's toast attribute set
Add the three missing project nodes to the sitemap page and drop its six-card description
Add target=_blank rel=noopener to the 13 external anchors that lack it
Extend the gate-payload guard to decode and assert for BOTH gates, and drop the stale no-integrity-guard claim from CLAUDE.md
Untrack the 5 stale queue snapshots and 4 dated docs reports, delete the 56 loop probes and 7 unreferenced one-shot scripts

tensionsOpen.resolution: Sequence, do not choose: land the python serializer at queue-edit.ps1:91 FIRST, then the pwsh fix. Fixing the broken command alone would fire the dormant ConvertTo-Json bug and rewrite all 592KB.
Reroute all seven anchors plus the two stub refs to the client-gated design pages; keep the rule. PROMOTE via adr-promoter: 10 runs is an undecided decision, not a tradeoff to re-balance.
Keep the helper's lock and readback, swap only its serializer to python. PROMOTE via adr-promoter.
Move the guards to deploy-pages.yml so every writer crosses them, AND scope release.ps1's staging to a pathspec so the one-command flow survives. Both dimensions win; neither is sacrificed.
Use the existing empty exclude list at the publish boundary, or accept as locked. Narrow question for Kane. PROMOTE via adr-promoter.
Escalation trigger still not met (1.08x, not 3x). The enqueue wire is fixed this run, so let two runs produce closure data, then ask Kane with a cost-per-closed-action number.
Add the guard, keep the motion. Not a real tension; the contrast lift holds the same cool hue.
Stamper owns countable facts (derive the hero counts at runtime), human owns voice.
